arts.sum: Those supporters who have been informed to collect their tickets for this match, will be sent an email in advance of the date of the game with all the relevant ticket collection details. Ticket collections will continue to be enforced along with the Away Ticket Transfer service, as part of our ongoing efforts to ensure that genuine Arsenal supporters are using these tickets.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Analysed: 5 reasons for our Forest success
arts.sum: Odegaard v Forest Chances created 6 Assists 1 Passes in final third 35 Touches in opposition box 9 Shots 2 Successful dribbles 3 After Jorginho picked up a hard yellow card, Thomas Partey replaced him at half-time and promptly delivered a masterclass in central midfield play, scoring within seven minutes of entering the fray.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres REJECTS Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Man Utd are currently the frontrunners to land the Sweden international, but Gyokeres has turned down an offer from both Premier League giants, as per Spanish outlet El Nacional . Sporting CP forward Viktor Gyokeres has rejected offers from both Arsenal and Manchester United, according to sensational reports in Spain.
